HGSS.560.0000:
Do any of your Pokémon know...
what they call the hidden moves?\f
When a Pokémon faints, it just means
it doesn’t have the power to battle.\f
But it can still use hidden moves
outside of battle!
HGSS.560.0001:
Bill’s PC can store up to 30
Pokémon per Box.
HGSS.560.0002:
Do you know what an Apricorn is?\f
You crack it open to discard the core
and put it in this special machine...\r
Then you can catch Pokémon!\f
Before Poké Balls became available,
everybody used Apricorns to\r
catch Pokémon.
